import react, { useState } from "react"; import {useParams} from 'react-router-dom'; import Breadcrumb from "../Breadcrumb/Breadcrumb.jsx"; import products from "../Data/Data.js" const Menu = () =>{ const {id } = useParams(); const product = products.find((product) => product.id == id); const { imageO1,image02,image03,image04, name,desc,price,category,sizes } = product; const [categor01,category02] = category; const [small, medium,large] = sizes; const [smallPrice, mediumPrice,largePrice] = price; const [size,setSize] = useState(); const [image,setImage] = useState(); return ( <>
setImage(imageO1)} src={`../../${imageO1}`} alt={name} />

Category : {categor01.toUpperCase()} , {category02.toUpperCase()}

{name}

{/* */}
03 customer review

{desc}

${mediumPrice}

Add to Cart
Size :
{small} {medium} {large}
) } export default Menu;
